chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – Causing the gladness to enter upon the Momineen

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/101)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/101)
text: أَيُّمَا مُسْلِمٍ لَقِيَ مُسْلِماً فَسَرَّهُ سَرَّهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ismail Bin Mansour, from Al Mufazzal,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Whichever Muslim meets a Muslim, so he gladdens him, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Gladden him’.
en.sarwar: 15. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Isma’il ibn Mansur from al-Mufaddal from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Any Muslim who, on his meeting another Muslim, sends joy to his heart, Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, sends joy to his (initiator of joy) heart.”
